object_category.notes: Geo-Harmony reward, sensor_noise point reframe, rollout/votes=8, lr=5e-10, KL=0.3.

joint_type.notes: Weight-update Geo-Harmony collapsed on this type; vote8 majority is positive.

movable_part.notes: Positive but small gain; use as conservative test-time voting, not weight update.

ttrl_reference.comparison: Geo-Harmony-QType best results are above adapted TTRL step1 on all three question types.

collapse_findings: Joint and movable weight updates can increase pseudo reward while validation accuracy drops.

The failure mode matches the TTRL collapse described in arXiv 2603.08660: self-reward sharpens stable predictions; when stability is not correlated with correctness, stable wrong answers are reinforced.
For joint_type, training batches showed high reward on wrong pseudo labels, e.g. 7/8 agreement on an incorrect joint option, then validation dropped.
For these fragile types, test-time vote selection was safer than updating model weights.
early_stop_recommendations: Always save and reuse fixed step0 validation JSONL per question_type via trainer.validation_step0_cache_jsonl.
Use TEST_FREQ=1 for tuning runs; validate every step and stop on accuracy_drop, best_accuracy_drop, invalid_rate_increase, or hit_max_response_length_increase.
For full vote8 runs, stream-prefix monitor after at least 1000 prompts; abort if majority accuracy is below fixed step0 by more than 0.005.
Monitor collapse indicators: high train/physx/ttrv_reward_mean with low train/physx/majority_acc@votes, rising hit_max_response_length_rate, or pseudo label concentration on one option.
Keep pseudo-label gates available: TTRL_MIN_MAJORITY_RATIO and TTRL_MAX_MAJORITY_RATIO. They reduce bad updates but did not fully solve joint_type collapse.

metric_definitions.reported_best_acc: For object_category, normal parsed-response accuracy after weight update. For joint_type and movable_part, majority_accuracy over 8 sampled responses per question (acc@8 majority vote).
metric_definitions.top_level_accuracy: Response-average accuracy over JSONL rows. In vote8 runs this averages all 8 sampled responses per question and is not the headline method output.
metric_definitions.majority_accuracy: Accuracy after grouping responses by question id and taking the majority parsed prediction. This is the reported acc@8 metric for vote8 runs.
metric_definitions.pass_at_votes_or_best_accuracy_at_votes: Oracle diagnostic: whether any sampled response in the vote set is correct. Not used as final method accuracy.

step_history.note: fixed baseline; one response per question
selected best; one response per question

step_history_note: Archived final object run has validation only at steps 0 and 4 because TEST_FREQ=4. Final joint/movable selected runs are RUN_MODE=baseline vote8 runs, so only step 0 exists. Earlier failed tuning logs were cleaned from outputs; fixed step0 caches and key metrics are archived under results/physx_geo_harmony_qtype_repro_20260526/.
